Watson (Nigel Bruce) brings in Holmes (Basil Rathbone) on a case of ritual murder at the old Musgrave estate.
programme.title: Sherlock Holmes Faces Death

programme.desc: A lovesick attorney (Raymond Burr) tries to trap a murder client (Angela Lansbury) he got acquitted by arranging for her to kill him.
programme.title: Please Murder Me

programme.desc: Burlesque dancer Dixie Daisy is the prime suspect when rival dancers are found strangled with their own stage costumes. Aided by infatuated stand-up comic Biff Brannigan, Dixie must find the killer before she becomes his next victim.
programme.title: Lady of Burlesque

programme.desc: With an ambitious plan, a PR woman and a country-music bandleader turn a Texas truck driver into a rock 'n' roll star.
programme.title: Loving You

programme.desc: Two vaudeville flops (Bing Crosby, Bob Hope) pose as bad guys and join the Klondike gold rush with a saloon singer (Dorothy Lamour).
programme.title: Road to Utopia

programme.desc: The first manned flight to Mars is a flop, so a space official (Hal Holbrook) fakes it Hollywood-style for the public.
programme.title: Capricorn One

programme.desc: An outstanding jazz score highlights this tale of two American musicians in Paris whose lives are changed by tourists.
programme.title: Paris Blues

programme.desc: Two buddies win a car and head for Hollywood to meet Anita Ekberg.
programme.title: Hollywood or Bust

programme.desc: International swindlers are diverted from their sinister dealings when an explosion wrecks the ship they are aboard.
programme.title: Beat the Devil

programme.desc: A Virginia militia captain (Gary Cooper) rivals a Colonial trader (Howard da Silva) for an indentured Englishwoman (Paulette Goddard) around Indians.
programme.title: Unconquered

programme.desc: Two sailors (Frank Sinatra, Gene Kelly) on leave in Hollywood help an actress (Kathryn Grayson) get her big break.
programme.title: Anchors Aweigh

programme.desc: An outlaw is left by his cohorts and girlfriend to be captured after he is wounded during a heist. When he is released from prison, he tracks his old crew to a run-down town and plays a game of cat and mouse with them.
programme.title: Gun the Man Down

programme.desc: An English girl's dream of racing her horse in the Grand National thunders to reality with the help of a former jockey.
programme.title: National Velvet

programme.desc: Dr. Stein (Peter Cushing) and his assistant (Francis Matthews) sew up a new monster, Karl (Michael Gwynn).
programme.title: The Revenge of Frankenstein

programme.desc: Groucho, Chico, Harpo and Zeppo take advantage of hotel guests during the Florida land boom.
programme.title: The Cocoanuts

programme.desc: Friends (Guy Madison, Kim Novak, Brian Keith) join a college student's scheme to rob a Reno casino for kicks.
programme.title: 5 Against the House

programme.desc: The girl (Glynnis O'Connor) next door makes a teen (John Travolta) born with immune deficiencies want to leave his germ-free bubble.
programme.title: The Boy in the Plastic Bubble

programme.desc: A reporter hears how an ex-convict (James Caan) and an Indian woman (Stefanie Powers) destroyed an Old West town overnight.
programme.title: Gone With the West

programme.desc: A Supreme Court justice on a duck-hunting foray becomes involved in serious trouble with the citizens in a small town.
programme.title: A Stranger in Town

programme.desc: A naughty little girl (Shirley Temple) dreams she and her brother are sent by a fairy to find the bluebird of happiness.
programme.title: The Blue Bird

programme.desc: An old trucker (Henry Fonda) steals his truck for one last cross-country run, with a madam (Eileen Brennan) and her crew on board.
programme.title: The Great Smokey Roadblock

programme.desc: A missionary (Leo Genn) in Kenya tells a drifter (Cornel Wilde) his uranium-miner brother has been killed by leopard men.
programme.title: Beyond Mombasa

programme.desc: Hopalong Cassidy (William Boyd) pins rustling on a casino owner and his twin brother (Stanley Ridges).
programme.title: Silver on the Sage

programme.desc: Two detective-school graduates (Bud Abbott, Lou Costello) help a framed boxer who can make himself disappear.
programme.title: Abbott and Costello Meet the Invisible Man

programme.desc: Daily news from the State of Israel.
programme.title: ILTV News

programme.desc: S01 E201 — The Tomb of the Patriarchs Academy Award winner Jon Voight and his companions travel to The Tomb of the Patriarchs, the burial site of the Bible's Abraham and his family. There, they learn and discuss the historical and religious relevance of the site.
programme.title: Land of Israel: God's Story

programme.desc: S01 E02 — Hannah Prays for a Son Elkanah has two wives: Peninnah, who has children and Hannah, who is barren; they come to sacrifice at the Mishkan in Shiloh, but Hannah is feeling left out, not having children of her own, so she leaves the camp and goes to pray at the Mishkan.
programme.title: Land of Israel: God's Story

programme.title: Today with Marilyn & Sarah
programme.desc: Marilyn& Sarah Ministries is a global, miracle ministry responding to God's callto cover the earth with the Word and connect every one with the heart of God.For nearly 50 years they have empowered ordinary people to tap into thelife-changing power of the gospel through prayer, Bible teaching, humanitarianand evangelistic outreaches, healing meetings, and their daily TV program,Today with Marilyn & Sarah.

programme.title: Breakthrough with Rod Parsley
programme.desc: Breakthrough is the worldwide soul-winning media ministry of Rod Parsley, advancing the kingdom of God around the world through the eye of the camera. Multiplied millions are being challenged to become redemptive agents of change for kingdom advancement in their communities and homes. With practical teaching helping to grow strong Christians, Breakthrough with Rod Parsley makes a significant impact by boldly proclaiming the authority of Jesus Christ to save, heal and transform. Breakthrough with Rod Parsley is committed to reaching this generation with relevant truth to meet the challenges of the real world.

programme.title: Good Morning LIVE
programme.desc: Good Morning LIVE is an engaging 30-minute program designed to inspire, inform, and connect viewers to the heart of meaningful living. Hosted by James Epperly, this dynamic show brings together a unique blend of inspirational devotions, thought-provoking interviews, and discussions on current events that matter most to you. Each episode offers uplifting messages to start your day on a positive note, insightful conversations with special guests, and a closer look at how current events align with faith and personal growth. Whether you're seeking encouragement, knowledge, or a deeper connection to today's world, Good Morning LIVE is your source for faith-filled and relevant content. Join us weekday mornings to experience a fresh perspective, inspired by truth and guided by hope.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world’s leading practicalBible teachers and New York Times bestselling author, shares encouragement andadvice to help people enjoy daily life.

programme.title: Gospel Truth with Andrew Wommack
programme.desc: Thirty-two years ago a man had an encounter with God that changed his life forever. Today, he shares that experience with thousands of people all over the world. The goal of Andrew Wommack is to reach as many people as possible with the love of God and message of grace and faith. He doesn’t measure the success of the ministry by the number of tapes distributed, books sold or offerings received. The real rewards, and proof that God is alive and working in people’s lives, are the many testimonies he receives from the people impacted by his teachings. To find out more, please visit our website at: http://www.awmi.net http://www.awmi.net/ www.awmi.net

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: Rick Renner is widely known for his interpretation of the Greek New Testament and his engaging teaching style. His teaching is punctuated by a unique ability to draw vividly descriptive word pictures from the Greek that illuminate the Scriptures in a fresh, new way. Rick also distinctively shares Bible principles through contemporary illustrations set against an extensive cultural and historical backdrop of New Testament times. In each episode of “Rick Renner,” Rick teaches in-depth on a passage of Scripture verse by verse, centered around a specific theme that is vitally relevant to the lives of believers who are hungry to dig deeper into the treasures of God’s Word. For more information, visit http://www.renner.org.

programme.title: Run The Streets with Debra George
programme.desc: Debra takes you to the darkest streets of America to win souls.

programme.title: The James Epperly Show

Each episode is designed to offer spiritual guidance, biblical wisdom, and practical advice for living a Christ-centered life. With its friendly and welcoming vibe, 'The James Epperly Show' aims to support viewers' spiritual development and enhance their connection with God, making it a treasured part of their weekly viewing schedule.

She lives in the Orlando area with her husband, Jonathan Cain.

programme.title: Believer's Voice of Victory
programme.desc: KCM is committed to keeping the Word of God before your eyes—teaching you how to live victoriously—so that you are rooted and grounded enough to overcome your own adversity, reach out to others and share those same principles. programme.title: Today with Marilyn & Sarah
programme.desc: Marilyn& Sarah Ministries is a global, miracle ministry responding to God's callto cover the earth with the Word and connect every one with the heart of God.For nearly 50 years they have empowered ordinary people to tap into thelife-changing power of the gospel through prayer, Bible teaching, humanitarianand evangelistic outreaches, healing meetings, and their daily TV program,Today with Marilyn & Sarah.

programme.title: Breakthrough with Rod Parsley
programme.desc: Breakthrough is the worldwide soul-winning media ministry of Rod Parsley, advancing the kingdom of God around the world through the eye of the camera. Multiplied millions are being challenged to become redemptive agents of change for kingdom advancement in their communities and homes. With practical teaching helping to grow strong Christians, Breakthrough with Rod Parsley makes a significant impact by boldly proclaiming the authority of Jesus Christ to save, heal and transform. Breakthrough with Rod Parsley is committed to reaching this generation with relevant truth to meet the challenges of the real world.

programme.title: Good Morning LIVE
programme.desc: Good Morning LIVE is an engaging 30-minute program designed to inspire, inform, and connect viewers to the heart of meaningful living. Hosted by James Epperly, this dynamic show brings together a unique blend of inspirational devotions, thought-provoking interviews, and discussions on current events that matter most to you. Each episode offers uplifting messages to start your day on a positive note, insightful conversations with special guests, and a closer look at how current events align with faith and personal growth. Whether you're seeking encouragement, knowledge, or a deeper connection to today's world, Good Morning LIVE is your source for faith-filled and relevant content. Join us weekday mornings to experience a fresh perspective, inspired by truth and guided by hope.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world’s leading practicalBible teachers and New York Times bestselling author, shares encouragement andadvice to help people enjoy daily life.

programme.title: Gospel Truth with Andrew Wommack
programme.desc: Thirty-two years ago a man had an encounter with God that changed his life forever. Today, he shares that experience with thousands of people all over the world. The goal of Andrew Wommack is to reach as many people as possible with the love of God and message of grace and faith. He doesn’t measure the success of the ministry by the number of tapes distributed, books sold or offerings received. The real rewards, and proof that God is alive and working in people’s lives, are the many testimonies he receives from the people impacted by his teachings. To find out more, please visit our website at: http://www.awmi.net http://www.awmi.net/ www.awmi.net

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: Rick Renner is widely known for his interpretation of the Greek New Testament and his engaging teaching style. His teaching is punctuated by a unique ability to draw vividly descriptive word pictures from the Greek that illuminate the Scriptures in a fresh, new way. Rick also distinctively shares Bible principles through contemporary illustrations set against an extensive cultural and historical backdrop of New Testament times. In each episode of “Rick Renner,” Rick teaches in-depth on a passage of Scripture verse by verse, centered around a specific theme that is vitally relevant to the lives of believers who are hungry to dig deeper into the treasures of God’s Word. For more information, visit http://www.renner.org.

programme.title: Concepts Of Faith with Charles Capps
programme.desc: ArkansasFarmer, Charles Capps and family discovered that the spiritual truths Jesustaught could be applied to the everyday circumstances of life and change it!The practical teaching of how to do that is needed and relevant for everyonetoday. Charles, wife Peggy and daughter Annette share life changing truths.

programme.title: Brian & Bobbie Houston - JesusFollowers.TV
programme.desc: "What greater honour and testimony is there than to be a devotedand passionate follower of the Lord Jesus Christ. Bobbie and I believe in the Church, thelocal church and the power and blessing of being planted (Psalm 92). We alsobelieve that in this day and age, God is creating multiple ways to water theseeds and greatness of calling within. Jesusfollowers.TV is here towelcome and extend our table of life and experience to you. This onlineplatform is here to love, encourage, and be a trustworthy voice of hope andinspiration in the days ahead. Our heart is to serve the God-given potentialwithin you and the Body of Christ. As Eph 2:21-22 says, we are all beingbuilt into a holy habitation for the Living God - brick by brick, stone bystone, with Jesus Christ as the Chief Cornerstone. May Jesusfollowers.TV be ablessing to you and those you care for” Brian and Bobbie Houston

She hosts Paula Today, a nationally syndicated daily broadcast reaching a potential audience of 5.7 billion people in over 200 countries. She is a leading Pastor, a renowned life coach, bestselling author, and highly sought-after motivational speaker. She lives in the Orlando area with her husband, Jonathan Cain.

programme.desc: Former Hollywood actress, pop culture expert, Tina Griffin, left her Wisconsin dairy farm at the age of 20 and headed to Hollywood, CA to earn a BA in Film and Television broadcasting from California State University - Los Angeles. She’s traveled globally for the past 20 years delivering her eye-opening show, Hollywood Exposed https://counterculturemom.com/adult-session/ , explaining the real agenda behind the entertainment industry and its impact on the foundational development of today’s youth. Besides being in countless movies, Tina has worked on TV shows such as Jimmy Kimmel Live!, Young and the Restless, Days of Our Lives, Lizzie McGuire, Drake and Josh, and Malcolm in the Middle, competed in the Miss America pageant and worked at the OSCARS. She was involved with the Film Society as well as Women in Film and an active member of the Screen Actors Guild (SAG) and the American Federation of Television and Radio Artists (AFTRA). She has opened for bands such as Colton Dixon, Third Day, and Jeremy Camp. programme.title: Bible Coaching
programme.desc: There are tens of thousands of personal development books out there, but for me, the Bible is the foundation of wisdom, strength, and direction for every chapter of life. In this episode, we explore how Scripture gives us real guidance for healing, courage, discipline, purpose, and moving forward with confidence. We reflect on Philippians chapter 3, verses 13–14, where Paul reminds us to let go of what’s behind and press forward toward what God has ahead. This is more than inspiration—it’s a powerful life strategy for anyone ready to grow, change, and step into their next chapter.

programme.title: Christian Coaching Session on New Beginnings-for-2026
programme.desc: This Christian life coaching session is rooted in biblical themes of new beginnings and God’s constant presence. The video offers calm guidance, spiritual encouragement, and practical life-coaching reflections to help you let go of the past and invite God into your everyday life. If you’re feeling stuck, tired, or uncertain about the future, this session is designed to bring reassurance, clarity, and hope — reminding you that you don’t have to walk your journey alone. Life coaching is a practical goal-setting process, and when supported by faith and spirituality, it has the power unimaginable.
